summary: Verified Care Manager admin panel with comprehensive product/bundle taxonomy. All features working: Admin login, Care Manager navigation, Products tab with purple badges (good_for_tags) and teal badges (intent_tags), Edit modal with all taxonomy fields (Size/Coat/Life Stage/Temperament/Intent), Save functionality with success confirmation, Bundles tab with tagged bundles, and Seed Care Products button.

CareManager.jsx: Intent Tags section shows 9 care intent options with clickable badges - VERIFIED
CareManager.jsx: Products display purple badges (good_for_tags) with bg-purple-50 text-purple-700 styling - VERIFIED
CareManager.jsx: Products display teal badges (intent_tags) with bg-teal-50 text-teal-700 styling - VERIFIED
CareManager.jsx: Bundles display purple badges for good_for_tags with +N overflow indicator - VERIFIED
care_products_master.py: Contains 18 comprehensive products with full taxonomy - VERIFIED
care_products_master.py: Contains 12 bundles organized by size/coat/life_stage/intent - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Seed Care Products button creates 18 products and 12 bundles with comprehensive taxonomy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Care Manager comprehensive taxonomy verified. Products have good_for_tags (purple badges) for Size/Coat/Life Stage/Temperament and intent_tags (teal badges) for Care Use Cases. Edit modal shows full tag selection UI. Bundles also show tags with discount percentage badges.
